000b76  f7fffffe          BL       SPI_Open
;;;1343   
;;;1344       /* Enable the automatic hardware slave select function. Select the SS pin and configure as low-active. */
;;;1345       SPI_EnableAutoSS(SPI0, SPI_SS, SPI_SS_ACTIVE_LOW);

;;;1346   }

                  Calc_CRC8 PROC
;;;1398   //********************************************************** 
;;;1399   uint8_t Calc_CRC8(uint8_t *data, uint8_t Num,uint8_t intial) 
000e14  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1400   { uint8_t bit,byte,crc;
000e16  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000e18  4610              MOV      r0,r2
;;;1401   	crc=intial;
;;;1402   	for(byte=0; byte<Num; byte++)
000e1a  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;1403   	{ 
;;;1404   		crc^=(data[byte]);
;;;1405       for(bit=8;bit>0;--bit) 
;;;1406          {
;;;1407   				 if (crc&0x80) crc=(crc<<1)^0x31;
000e1c  2531              MOVS     r5,#0x31
000e1e  e010              B        |L1.3650|
                  |L1.3616|
000e20  5ce2              LDRB     r2,[r4,r3]            ;1404
000e22  4050              EORS     r0,r0,r2              ;1404
000e24  2208              MOVS     r2,#8                 ;1405
                  |L1.3622|
000e26  0606              LSLS     r6,r0,#24
000e28  d503              BPL      |L1.3634|
000e2a  ea850040          EOR      r0,r5,r0,LSL #1
000e2e  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
000e30  e001              B        |L1.3638|
                  |L1.3634|
;;;1408   	       else crc=(crc<<1);
000e32  0640              LSLS     r0,r0,#25
000e34  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
                  |L1.3638|
000e36  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1              ;1405
000e38  b2d2              UXTB     r2,r2                 ;1405
000e3a  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;1405
000e3c  d1f3              BNE      |L1.3622|
000e3e  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;1402
000e40  b2db              UXTB     r3,r3                 ;1402
                  |L1.3650|
000e42  428b              CMP      r3,r1                 ;1402
000e44  d3ec              BCC      |L1.3616|
;;;1409          }
;;;1410     }
;;;1411     return crc;
;;;1412   }
000e46  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1413   //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
                          ENDP

;;;1446               u8Err = 1u;
;;;1447               break;
;;;1448           case 0x28u:

                  dispchar24 PROC

;;;4196   void dispchar24(uint16_t k1,uint16_t k2)

000ff6  f8351011          LDRH     r1,[r5,r1,LSL #1]     ;4200

                  COMM PROC
;;;1603   void COMM(void)
0011fc  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1604   {
;;;1605   if (id)
0011fe  4d17              LDR      r5,|L1.4700|
001200  3d80              SUBS     r5,r5,#0x80
001202  f8950030          LDRB     r0,[r5,#0x30]  ; id
001206  2800              CMP      r0,#0
001208  d016              BEQ      |L1.4664|
;;;1606     {
;;;1607   		id=0; 
00120a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
00120c  f8856030          STRB     r6,[r5,#0x30]
;;;1608   		if (printout==1)
001210  f8950045          LDRB     r0,[r5,#0x45]  ; printout
001214  2801              CMP      r0,#1
001216  d10f              BNE      |L1.4664|
;;;1609   	  { 
;;;1610   			/* Send 1 byte data */
;;;1611         UART_WRITE(UART0,ReadEE(printcnt));
001218  4c10              LDR      r4,|L1.4700|
00121a  8f20              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x38]  ; printcnt
00121c  f7fffffe          BL       ReadEE
001220  4913              LDR      r1,|L1.4720|
001222  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1612         printcnt++;	
001224  8f20              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x38]  ; printcnt
001226  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
001228  8720              STRH     r0,[r4,#0x38]
;;;1613         if (printcnt>1801)
00122a  8f20              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x38]  ; printcnt
00122c  f2407109          MOV      r1,#0x709
001230  4288              CMP      r0,r1
001232  d901              BLS      |L1.4664|
;;;1614   			   {
;;;1615   				   printout=0;
001234  f8856045          STRB     r6,[r5,#0x45]
                  |L1.4664|
;;;1616   			 	 }
;;;1617   		 }
;;;1618      }
;;;1619   }	
001238  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
00123a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.4668|
                          DCD      g_I2C_i32ErrCode
                  |L1.4672|
                          DCD      0x40081000
                  |L1.4676|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L1.4680|
                          DCD      0x40008000
                  |L1.4684|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0xffc
                  |L1.4688|
                          DCD      0x4004304c
                  |L1.4692|
                          DCD      0x40018000
                  |L1.4696|
                          DCD      ||area_number.157||+0x686c
                  |L1.4700|
                          DCD      ||.data||+0x80
                  |L1.4704|
                          DCD      ||area_number.157||+0x47ac
                  |L1.4708|
                          DCD      ||area_number.157||+0x3dc8
                  |L1.4712|
                          DCD      ||area_number.157||+0x3b26
                  |L1.4716|
                          DCD      ||area_number.157||+0x450a
                  |L1.4720|

                          ENDP

                  SYS_Init PROC
;;;1620   /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
;;;1621   void SYS_Init(void)
001274  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1622   {
;;;1623         /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
;;;1624       /* Init System Clock                                                                                       */
;;;1625       /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
;;;1626       /* Enable HIRC clock */
;;;1627       CLK_EnableXtalRC(CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk);
001276  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
001278  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_EnableXtalRC
;;;1628

                  SelectErase PROC
;;;3332   /*---------------------------------------------*/
;;;3333   void SelectErase(uint8_t layer,uint8_t loc)
00157c  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}

                  uint_to_bcd PROC
;;;5101   /*---------------------------------------------*/
;;;5102   uint32_t uint_to_bcd(uint32_t m)
0018b8  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;5103   {
;;;5104   	uint32_t n=1;
0018ba  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
;;;5105   	uint32_t r=0,a;
0018bc  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
;;;5106   	while(m)
;;;5107   	{
;;;5108   		a=m % 10;
0018be  230a              MOVS     r3,#0xa
0018c0  e008              B        |L1.6356|
                  |L1.6338|
0018c2  fbb0f4f3          UDIV     r4,r0,r3
0018c6  fb030414          MLS      r4,r3,r4,r0
;;;5109   		m=m / 10;
0018ca  fbb0f0f3          UDIV     r0,r0,r3
;;;5110   		r=r+n*a;
0018ce  fb012204          MLA      r2,r1,r4,r2
;;;5111   		n=n<<4;
0018d2  0109              LSLS     r1,r1,#4
                  |L1.6356|
0018d4  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;5106
0018d6  d1f4              BNE      |L1.6338|
;;;5112   	}	
;;;5113   	return r;
0018d8  4610              MOV      r0,r2
;;;5114   }
0018da  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;5115   
                          ENDP

                  dispVT_limit PROC

                  compute PROC
;;;4538   //nnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnn
;;;4539   void compute(uint8_t freq,uint8_t dut)
001b0e  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;4540   {
;;;4541   uint8_t temp,dutl,duth;
;;;4542   uint16_t h_word;
;;;4543   uint32_t u32temp;	
;;;4544   temp=dut;
;;;4545   dutl=temp & 0x0f;
001b10  f001020f          AND      r2,r1,#0xf
;;;4546   duth=temp>>4;   
001b14  0909              LSRS     r1,r1,#4
;;;4547   h_word=freq*(dutl+duth);
001b16  1853              ADDS     r3,r2,r1
001b18  4343              MULS     r3,r0,r3
001b1a  b29b              UXTH     r3,r3
;;;4548   inspirtion_time=6000000*duth/h_word ;  /*  60*f/prescal f=12000000 ,prescal=120 */
001b1c  4c3c              LDR      r4,|L1.7184|
001b1e  434c              MULS     r4,r1,r4
001b20  fbb4f5f3          UDIV     r5,r4,r3
001b24  4c3b              LDR      r4,|L1.7188|
001b26  6225              STR      r5,[r4,#0x20]  ; inspirtion_time
;;;4549   exspirtion_time=6000000*dutl/h_word ; 	
001b28  4d39              LDR      r5,|L1.7184|
001b2a  4355              MULS     r5,r2,r5
001b2c  fbb5f5f3          UDIV     r5,r5,r3
001b30  6265              STR      r5,[r4,#0x24]  ; exspirtion_time
;;;4550   u32temp=h_word*VT_preset*3/(25*duth) ; /*'3*/	
001b32  f5a474c0          SUB      r4,r4,#0x180
001b36  f8944038          LDRB     r4,[r4,#0x38]  ; VT_preset
001b3a  4363              MULS     r3,r4,r3
001b3c  eb0104c1          ADD      r4,r1,r1,LSL #3
001b40  eb030343          ADD      r3,r3,r3,LSL #1
001b44  eb041401          ADD      r4,r4,r1,LSL #4
001b48  fbb3f3f4          UDIV     r3,r3,r4
;;;4551   lq=u32temp;
001b4c  4c2c              LDR      r4,|L1.7168|
001b4e  341e              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x1e
001b50  8023              STRH     r3,[r4,#0]
;;;4552   simvcp=1125/freq;  //60s*25 *75%  40ms
001b52  f2404365          MOV      r3,#0x465
001b56  fbb3f3f0          UDIV     r3,r3,r0
001b5a  86e3              STRH     r3,[r4,#0x36]
;;;4553   simvst=duth*1500/freq/(duth+dutl);
001b5c  f24053dc          MOV      r3,#0x5dc
001b60  434b              MULS     r3,r1,r3

                  main PROC
;;;1747   /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
;;;1748   int main(void)
0038dc  b0aa              SUB      sp,sp,#0xa8
;;;1749   {   
;;;1750   	  uint8_t a,b;
;;;1751   	  uint16_t i;
;;;1752   	  int32_t  u32;
;;;1753   	  uint32_t u32addr,u32data;
;;;1754   	  //S_RTC_TIME_DATA_T sWriteRTC;
;;;1755   	  KPI_KEY_T queue[32] = {0};
0038de  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
0038e0  a808              ADD      r0,sp,#0x20
